user.title: Samsung Frame TV
user.description: Enter the TV's IP address. Accept the 'Allow' prompt on the TV when it appears.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the TV. Check the IP and that it is powered on.
error.not_a_frame: This Samsung TV does not report Frame support.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The device at this address is a different TV.

data_description.heartbeat_seconds: How often the TV is polled for power state. Push events arrive instantly regardless.

send_key.name: Send key
send_key.description: Sends a remote-control key to the TV (e.g. KEY_HOME, KEY_MENU, KEY_UP).

key.name: Key
key.description: The Samsung key code to send.

set_art_mode.name: Set art mode
set_art_mode.description: Switches the TV into or out of art mode (TV must be on).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to show art, false to switch to watching.
